_notes: Keyed corrections applied to source trip text before rendering. 'scope':'global' replaces every occurrence of 'original' anywhere; 'scope':'instance' only replaces the exact phrase (used for common words like 'thought'/'he's' that are usually correct elsewhere). Declined corrections are kept here so future runs don't re-flag them. Apple Notes x-apple-data-detectors smart-link unwrapping (e.g. '[3:45](x-apple-data-detectors://...)' -> '3:45') is applied globally as a mechanical export-artifact cleanup, not tracked per-word here.
